name: open-presentation

notes: Progressive-disclosure public skill pack with zero-dependency HTML playback, adaptive input-derived scene planning, contextual product mockups and input-led language, varied scene lifecycles, closed per-scene dual-aspect QA, and direct player-integrated deterministic 4K WebM export.
